title: Surgeon Vacancy at Sun Pharmaceutical - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Sun Pharmaceutical - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Sun Pharmaceutical has an exciting opening for a Surgeon at our Bhubaneswar office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Sun Pharmaceutical:
Sun Pharmaceutical is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Clinical Research

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sun Pharmaceutical!
